title: Workshop Room
directions: Take the main stairs, turn right, and use the third door on the left.

title: Front Desk
directions: Stay on the ground floor and walk straight ahead from the entrance.

title: Maker Lab
directions: Pass the cafe seating area and enter the glass room on the right.

title: Quiet Room
directions: Take the elevator to the second floor and turn left at the mural wall.

title: Main Restrooms
directions: Walk past the maker lab hallway and follow the blue restroom signs.

title: Community Cafe
directions: Turn right from the entrance and head toward the open seating area.
